titleStmt.title: SII 15.195: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 195. (A.R. No. 447 of 1926.) KOṬṬAGI, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the front face of a pillar in the ruined Basava temple.
This is dated Śaka 1186, Raktākshi, Vaiśākha-puṇṇami, Sunday, corresponding to 1264 A.D., April 13.

The inscription commences with the well-known Vachana of Siddharāma. It seems to record a gift to a deity by the chief Chaṭṭayya of the Kadamba family of Goa, who is described as Paśchima-samudrādhipati. The epigraph is damaged and other details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī Ōṁ jaya paramēsvara paramātma Isvaranu[¨rbbī]
pa¨rbbiyaḍaṁgikoṁḍippanū¨rbbaṁṇnige
yāgi yōgigaḷa manada koneyajō
tīsvaranuṁ vriśabhana rūpāgiyuṁ yajamāna
Ācā¨ryyanuṁ tāneyāgi yōgādisaṁ
paṁna khaḷeyaṁgaḷellavaṁ saṁpādisi yōgarama
ṇīya kṣētravane sthaḷaviṭṭu salākheviḍidu Abhinava
śrīśailavana māḍi kapilasiddhamallikā¨rjjunadēvane
nelasi niṁdu puṇyapāpaṁgaḷaṁ baraṁvē
ḷdu besaṁ pēḷuttaviralu yēṁ besaṁ dēvā yinalu
I sthānadalu mānyavāgi Idda vūrugaḷaṁ bhū
migaḷaṁ dhanaṁgaḷaṁ I liṁgake hastōdakaṁ
māḍi koṭṭudaṁ manaṁ pēsade kaḷadukoṁḍahaneṁ
bātana mātāmātāpitru¨rggaḷallavaṁ Eppatta Ēḷu
kōṭi varusaṁbaraṁ puḷugoṁḍada narakadoḷagikki nī
nāhutigoḷutiru gaṁḍā Ele pāpavena Ī dēvana bhū
mi dhanakānaṁjaveneṁdu paṁdeyaṁ pāvaḍa¨rddaṁttama
naṁ bedari poḍavaṭanaṁ bēgaṁ sīghraṁ kaviḷāsake koṁ
ḍu bā gaṁḍā Ele puṁṇyave Iṁteraḍaṟa beṁge pu
ṇya pāpaṁgaḷuṁ pā¨rddukoṁḍo Ivudu tappadu di
ṭha diṭhaṁ satyaṁ gaṁḍire . Eṁdudu śrī siddharāma
nāthana vacana . © svasti śrī sakadārabhya 1186
neya raktākṣi saṁvatsarada vayiśākha su
dha puṁṇnami yādivāradalu śrīmadēvagi rau
mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara śrī sāraṁgapā
ṇidēvacaraṇakamaḷārādhanuṁ pratāpātu
ḷavikrama śrī dakṣiṇanarēṁdrō dvārāvatīpuravarādhīsva
ra kī¨rttigaruḍadhvaja śrī viṣṇuvaṁśōdbhava yāda
vapā¨rtthivakṣīrōdacaṁdrōdaya yari
rāyajagajhaṁpa yapratimalla gū¨rjjararāya
vāraṇaṁkuśa teluṁgada¨rppadaḷanadāvānaḷa ho
yisaṇarāyakōḷāhaḷa māḷavarāyarā
jyalakṣmi(ta) svayaṁvara sahajasāhasasaṁpādita
vijayalakṣmīvara dhai¨ryyō[¨rji]ta maṁdarābhō
gapuraṁdara yaudā¨ryyatatpara sāṁbrā
jyasaṁbhōgamahēṁdra pratāpalaṁkēsvara
pratijñāparasurāma rāyabhujabaḷabhīmarā
yanārāyaṇāvatāra yityādyanēkarājā
vaḷīsamāḷaṁkrita śrīmatu pravuḍhapratāpa
cakrava¨rtti mahādēvarāyarājyavijayōdayi
worn out
nimitta śrī pura
śaiḷayōgaramaṇi yapu
ravarādhīsvara śrī kapilasiddhamallikā¨rjjunadēvasya
yaṁgabhōga raṁgabhōga
jī¨rnnōddhāra yanēka prāsāda Aṣṭaśaṣṭi
damaged
śrī halasigedēśa
bāgenā
prasiddha sīmāsa jalapāṣāṇa
nikṣēpa Aṣṭabhōga samētaṁ suṁka sā
dadaṁḍa ṇādi sakaḷadrabyā
sa¨rvvabādhāpari
hāraṁ sa¨rvvanamasya śrīmatu saptakōṭīsva
radēvara labdhavaraprasāda kādaṁbakuḷatiḷaka
paścimasamudrādhipati śrī vīra
caṭṭayyadēvarasara rāya saṁprītiya
pū¨rvvakaṁ dhārā
pū¨rvvaka(ṁ) yācaṁdratārakaṁ sama¨rppitavānu .
dānapālanayō¨rmadhyē dānācchēyōnupālanaṁ dā
nātsva¨rggamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 15.195 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
